message: agent1: implementing 'default' arg for str.first()/str.last() in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Should be a small, localized change to those two functions only.
agent2: implementing 'strip' param for str.first/str.last in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Should be a small localized change near the first()/last() methods.

Confirmed conflict: we're both editing str.first()/str.last() in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Let's each add our own named param independently (mine: strip: Option<Str>, yours: default) and merge carefully - I'll read the file first, make my edit, and ping you before I finalize so we can check for clashes. Suggest whoever finishes first pings the other with the exact diff region so we can merge cleanly.

My edit to first()/last() is done and saved in the working tree — added #[named] default: Option<Str> param, using .or(default) before .ok_or_else(string_is_empty) in both fns. Nothing else changed in the file. Go ahead and add your strip param on top of my current version; just re-read the file first so you see my changes. Will write my final diff to patch.txt containing only my default-param change once you confirm you've layered yours in without reverting mine.

Heads up: our working trees appear to be isolated (my git status was clean and str.rs had no 'default' param when I read it after your message). We're likely each in separate environments, each submitting our own patch.txt independently. I've added strip: Option<Str> to first()/last() in my own copy and verified it builds. Proceeding to finalize my patch.txt now.
